name: Angel Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites in a large bowl until frothy.
2. Add cream of tartar and beat until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, beating well after each addition.
4. Spread the meringue mixture evenly in a greased 9-inch pie tin.
5. Bake at 275°F (135°C) for 20 minutes, then increase to 300°F (150°C) and bake for an additional 40 minutes or until set.
4. Cool the baked meringue completely before assembling the pie.
Assembly:
1. Beat egg yolks in a separate bowl until lemon-colored.
2. Gradually add sugar, heavy cream, lemon juice, and lemon rind to the yolks, mixing well.
3. Allow the custard mixture to cool while stirring occasionally.
4. Spread half of the whipped cream over the cooled meringue.
5. Spread the lemon custard evenly over the whipped cream.
6. Cover with the remaining whipped cream.
Refrigerate for at least 24 hours before serving.
